name: Pool Checkers
author: traditional / AGP port
description: Pool checkers (American Pool draughts): 8x8, 12 men each. Men capture forward and backward, flying kings, capture mandatory but ANY (not maximum). Defining rule: DEFERRED promotion — a man reaching the king row mid-capture keeps jumping as a man and promotes only at the end of the sequence (unlike Russian draughts, where it promotes and continues as a king). Leave the opponent with no legal move to win.
